blocks.content: Kaden put all his strength into it, but his fist ended up slicing through empty air.

blocks.speaker: Kaden
blocks.content: Huh? Empty air?
His movement stopped, but the people in the banquet hall were busy looking around.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: What? What's going on?
Not only Marcus, but the positions of everyone in the banquet hall had changed.
Uorin frowned.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Ugh.
Shirone noticed her expression but focused on assessing the situation first.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Did something just…?

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: I don't know.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Something definitely happened, but I don't know what. Was I standing next to you?
Shirone retraced his steps.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The process of getting here. I met Lupist in the hallway after leaving the room…
As he finished recalling, he felt a chill.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I definitely moved.
He had shifted about 3 centimeters from his remembered position.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Moreover, among those whose positions had changed, his was the shortest distance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I wasn't forcibly moved. If something moved, it was probably her mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I came here of my own will. Something happened that changed my mind.
It felt like one of two events had been chosen, like a quantum superposition.
Thus, those without temporal perception would feel an awkward sense of déjà vu.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Can you explain it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I have a guess. But what's hard to understand is the scale; it's too large.
Quantum superposition only affects where Shirone's actions occur…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But now, everyone's positions have changed. In other words, the entire event has been twisted.
It's beyond the level of temporal perception.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is the result of hundreds of wills being twisted simultaneously. Who could do this?

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Indeed.
Lupist rested his chin on his hand.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: As you said, it's not spatial movement. I'm standing here of my own will. But I have no memory of getting here. I was definitely over there.
He pointed to a corner of the banquet hall.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Plu was next to me, and I was meeting with an official from the Kingdom of Mun. The memory is clear. But the problem is, despite that, I feel like I came here of my own will.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's the key.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is it possible to accept a sudden change in position without memory?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There is a similar case.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shagal of the Swift Sword. His life was filled with memories implanted by Ra Enemy. That made him a murderer, and now he's fallen into hell.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, we've all experienced the same phenomenon as Shagal, to varying degrees.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Yes. Shagal's entire life was taken. Anyway, changing the cause to control the result requires authority at the level of Anke Ra.
Lupist summarized.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: So, the current situation involves a power that changes the mind and quantum signals. And its power is…
His gaze turned to the floor.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Enough to push Yahweh's mind by 3 centimeters?
Considering everyone's positions had changed significantly, Shirone had almost stayed in place.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A mind that doesn't waver under any variable.
But the fact that even Yahweh's steps had moved slightly was serious.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: The system has changed…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is definitely the work of the outside world. It's too soon to share this information.
Of course, some knew, and one of them might have reached the correct answer.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Uorin.
When Shirone turned his gaze, Uorin was hurriedly leaving the banquet hall.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Still, questions remain.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Yes. It's the result of everyone's will changing. Minds twisted, and I'm here. But then…
He pointed at Kaden.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Why did he swing his fist? If Marcus wasn't in front of him, his right hand shouldn't have moved.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, this is strange.
As Shirone turned his head, Kaden looked at his right hand, frowning.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What did I do?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He remembered Marcus harassing Maya, but he understood that Marcus wasn't in front of him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was just a delusion. That guy never actually approached me. So why did I…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Was I so angry just thinking about it? Is that really it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: His right hand gave no answer.
As everyone felt similar confusion, Fermi's cold gaze focused on Kaden.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: So that's it.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: It was one of the unanalysed keywords obtained from the Apocalypse.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Breakout.
A phenomenon of escaping the prison called the body, which allowed no gaps.
Uorin's face was covered in cold sweat as she left the banquet hall.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: This is impossible. How could this happen…
When the positions of the people in the banquet hall changed, her foresight twisted sharply.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The future has changed.
The lines of light swayed to the point of blinding, and a tremendous shock hit her brain.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The system. Changing it itself is beyond human capability. If it's possible…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Uorin—
She flinched.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: ...Hmph.
She knew he would follow her, but she still felt a bit disappointed.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: He only seeks me out at times like this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You know what happened just now, don't you?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: I don't. And even if I did, I have no reason to explain it to you. We're competitors.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: From a god's perspective.
He had shared the secret of the outside world with Fermi, so Uorin must have heard it too.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is something only a god can do. But I don't know exactly what happened.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Sigh.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Follow me.
She led him to the Kashan area, checked the surroundings, and entered her room.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: No one will come for the next 35 minutes.
There were no traces of any significant events in the hallway, as seen through her foresight.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: In other words, we only have 35 minutes. I'll explain briefly. I also have information from you.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Twelve countries gathered in the banquet hall. Some, like mine, had their kings attend, but a few didn't. The culprit is likely from one of those countries.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Mun. Southern. And…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Paras.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Yes. If a god's power was at work in the banquet hall, Paras, with the Pyramid of Truth, is a strong candidate. You can guess that King Kitra entered the pyramid.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It seems the emotional disease was cured too. The question is, how did they change the system?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The Zodiac.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The movement of the stars.
Some people had left the banquet hall, including Jin Kang, the emperor of Jincheon.

blocks.speaker: Jin Kang
blocks.content: Explain.
Anchal, who had approached, bowed and spoke.

blocks.speaker: Anchal
blocks.content: The Jincheon Space Agency is investigating. Nothing special has happened. But…

blocks.speaker: Anchal
blocks.content: But?

blocks.speaker: Anchal
blocks.content: The position of the stars has changed.
Jin Kang's expression turned displeased, and Anchal quickly continued.

blocks.speaker: Anchal
blocks.content: Actually, it's not enough to say they've changed. They might not have changed at all, but…

blocks.speaker: Anchal
blocks.content: Explain properly.
Anchal understood Jin Kang's frustration but had no better explanation.

blocks.speaker: Anchal
blocks.content: As Your Majesty felt, some event was suppressed into the realm of delusion. But if it was an event that might have actually happened…

blocks.speaker: Anchal
blocks.content: The position of the stars is different from before?

blocks.speaker: Jin Kang
blocks.content: Hmm, the position of the stars is different.

blocks.speaker: Jin Kang
blocks.content: What does that mean?
Uorin continued.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The first universe.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: All the actions of atoms from that moment created the current celestial bodies. Humans, and all beings in this universe, are bound by that law.
She opened the window.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Fish exist because there is water. Birds exist because there is the sky. Ancient humans realized this and named it fate.
Stars twinkled in the night sky.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Stars themselves don't have special power. It's just that the celestial bodies created by those initial conditions determine how certain humans live.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Kaden was born under the fate of the Southern Cross…

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: To be precise, Kaden's birth was determined from the beginning of the universe, and the result is the constellation we see now.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: A specific pattern created by the position of the stars.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The law changes. The beginning of the universe, the initial cause, changes, so the result changes too.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Yes. Moving a planet would cause a big problem. But if it's different from the start, there's no sense of incongruity.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Human logic is based on causality. I was born, I have parents, my parents have parents…

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: And finally, when you reach the beginning of the universe, human logic ends.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Conversely, because human logic starts from there, no matter what result comes out now, it doesn't seem strange.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Because it's a result reached by strictly following causality.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: That's why everyone in the banquet hall believed they were there of their own will, despite having different memories.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Yes. There are memory errors. But that's not all. The change in people's positions in the banquet hall is a universal-scale change.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The change might be infinitesimal, but Paras likely has the ability to make fine adjustments.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Nane said it was just the beginning. But did Fermi know that beginning would be Paras?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone, I can't figure out what Kitra is thinking. We need to uncover the secrets of the outside world faster than Paras.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: We're exploring the Pyramid of Truth, but it will take time. We need to resolve it before the Holy War ends…

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: There's one more thing.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Hmm?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: In Ymir's dream. The quantum signals being blocked means it's connected to the outside world, right?
Shirone fell silent at her cold analysis.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Come to think of it…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What are those who entered the dream to excavate Ultima doing now?
